FOnline ThirdParty pruning notes

This vendored copy is intentionally trimmed for the engine build. When updating
from upstream, remove these paths again after copying the new version.

Removed paths:
- cmake/
- projects/demos/
- projects/engine/dx9/
- projects/engine/irr/
- projects/engine/ogl/
- projects/external/glew/
- projects/QtCreator/
- rendering/
- thirdparty/glew-2.1.0/
- .gitignore
- CMakeLists.txt
- projects/engine/CMakeLists.txt
- projects/external/CMakeLists.txt
